fixes: Added update-fast, update-validated, and update-debug benchmark modes.
Fast update uses incremental graph digest instead of full graph fact hash.
Fast update skips global graph counts when prior repo state exists.
Rename detection now runs only for unknown/new paths.
Old cache entity lookup is skipped for empty incremental caches.
PathEvidence cleanup uses reverse-map materialized rows when available.
Static JS/TS resolver impact analysis is skipped for non-static-resolver changed paths.

storage_safety_rule.removed_data_disposition: No proof data was removed. JSON-scan cleanup remains as fallback for DBs without reverse maps; reverse-map-backed DBs use indexed materialized mappings.
storage_safety_rule.storage_note: A path_evidence_edges(edge_id, path_id) lookup index was added; the next storage gate must account for its size impact.
